$schema_note: Phase 1 — work that isn't owned by a single module: the shared frontend shell/component kit every page builds on, and the QA/security activities that run continuously across the whole phase rather than at the end. testing-definition.json is explicit that 'new business rules require tests in the same PR' — treat this file as ongoing discipline, not a final task list to do once.

work_packages.name: Shared UI Shell & Component Kit
work_packages.goal: The AppShell, navigation, shared DataTable/dialogs/badges/charts primitives that every feature page in 02-06 is built on. Should land early in Phase 1, in parallel with P1.AUTH, since nothing in pages-and-routes.json can be built without it.

tasks.title: shadcn/ui primitives install + theming
tasks.description: Copy-in shadcn/ui + Radix primitives; CSS-variable light/dark theme tokens; institutional navy/white palette (see docs/index.html :root custom properties as the reference palette).
acceptance_criteria: WCAG AA contrast verified on primary/secondary colors
tasks.notes: Exact component list to install first should come from SystemDefinition5.txt §4.

tasks.title: AppShell (sidebar + topbar) + routing scaffold
tasks.description: Collapsible sidebar (desktop)/drawer (mobile), topbar (search, notification bell, theme toggle, profile menu), React Router v6 createBrowserRouter with lazy route modules per feature.
acceptance_criteria: Nav items are role-filtered per roles-and-permissions.json
Initial bundle stays on track for < 200KB gzipped target via route code-splitting
tasks.notes: docs/index.html already implements this shell's full visual design — port CSS patterns directly.

tasks.title: Shared DataTable component
tasks.description: Server-side pagination/sort/filter, column visibility, empty/loading/error states, row actions by permission — used by every list page (students, faculty, sessions, records, corrections, audit logs, etc.).
acceptance_criteria: A single component instance powers all list pages without page-specific forks
tasks.notes: docs/index.html's .table-wrap/.toolbar/.pagination markup is a ready reference.

tasks.title: Shared feedback primitives: EmptyState, ErrorState, ConfirmDialog, StatusBadge, StatCard, toasts
tasks.description: Every list page: empty/loading/error states; every destructive action: ConfirmDialog; every mutation: toast (sonner) on success/failure; StatusBadge for Present/Late/Absent/Excused etc.
acceptance_criteria: Color is never the only status indicator — badges carry text (accessibility rule)

tasks.title: lib/ wiring: axios, socket.io-client, queryClient, dates (Asia/Manila), permissions
tasks.description: Singleton socket.io-client (JWT handshake, auto-reconnect); TanStack Query client with socket-event-driven invalidation; date-fns/date-fns-tz UTC↔Asia/Manila conversion; permissions.ts mirroring roles-and-permissions.json for UX-only gating.
acceptance_criteria: A socket event (e.g. attendance:recorded) correctly invalidates the matching TanStack Query key

tasks.title: PWA shell (vite-plugin-pwa) for scanner page
tasks.description: Installable, offline shell for the scanner page; scan submission still requires connectivity in Phase 1 (no offline queue yet).

work_packages.name: Continuous Testing & Quality Gates
work_packages.goal: The test pyramid and coverage targets from testing-definition.json, enforced continuously rather than bolted on at the end.

tasks.title: Vitest + Testing Library + Supertest + Playwright scaffolding
tasks.description: Test runners wired for unit (api services + shared schemas + web hooks/utils), component (web), integration (Supertest + Postgres service container / Testcontainers), E2E (Playwright, chromium + mobile viewport).
acceptance_criteria: pnpm test runs all tiers locally and in CI

tasks.title: Deterministic seed factories + OSAS mock personas wiring
tasks.description: faker with fixed seed: 1 term, 2 courses, 4 sections, 6 subjects, 3 faculty, 60 students, 8 offerings with schedules; injected clock for all time-dependent tests (no sleeps).

tasks.title: Coverage threshold enforcement (services/business rules 90%+)
tasks.description: auth, qr-attendance, and osas services must stay ≥90% lines/branches; CI fails the PR pipeline below threshold.
tasks.notes: Enforce vs. advisory-only depends on SystemDefinition5.txt §10 answer.

tasks.title: Per-endpoint authz-denial + validation-failure test convention
tasks.description: Every endpoint: happy path + authz denial + validation failure, per testing-definition.json coverage_targets.api_integration — codify as a shared test-helper pattern so every module WP follows it identically.

tasks.title: Nightly CI job: full suite + k6 smoke + npm audit report
tasks.description: Scheduled workflow distinct from PR/main pipelines.

tasks.title: Flaky-test quarantine policy
tasks.description: Flaky tests quarantined within 24h and fixed within a week — needs an owner and a tracking label/board column.

work_packages.name: Continuous Security Hardening
work_packages.goal: The OWASP Top 10 mapping and API protection baseline from security-definition.json, applied as each module lands rather than retrofitted before launch.

tasks.title: helmet + strict CSP + CORS allowlist
tasks.description: helmet defaults, HSTS in prod, CSP allowing only self + data: images; CORS explicit origin allowlist per environment, credentials enabled only for the SPA origin.

tasks.title: CSRF posture: SameSite=Lax cookie + Bearer-header requirement
tasks.description: Cookie alone never authorizes a mutation; every state-changing route requires the Bearer access token.
deliverables: middleware assertion / test covering this invariant

tasks.title: OWASP Top 10 mapping checklist — walk each item per module as it lands
tasks.description: A01 RBAC+ownership tested per role; A02 TLS/argon2id/AES-256-GCM/SHA-256 verified; A03 Prisma-only queries + zod stripping + React auto-escaping; A04 threat-modeled QR flow; A05 misconfig hardening; A06 npm audit+Dependabot; A07 auth-failure protections; A08 integrity (GCM tags, signed artifacts, append-only audit); A09 structured logging+alerts; A10 outbound allowlist.
deliverables: A living checklist doc (or WBS sub-tasks per item) checked off module-by-module
acceptance_criteria: Every A01–A10 item has at least one linked test or code review note before go-live

tasks.title: npm audit gate + Dependabot + dependency review on PRs
tasks.description: CI fails on high-severity advisories; Dependabot PRs auto-tested.

tasks.title: Mandatory owner review on security-sensitive paths
tasks.description: All changes via PR review; auth, qr, and attendance paths require an owning reviewer, not just any approval.
deliverables: CODEOWNERS file (or documented review policy for small teams)
tasks.notes: Only meaningful with more than one contributor — see SystemDefinition5.txt §1.

tasks.title: Pre-launch security self-review / pen-test decision
tasks.description: Decide and execute whether a formal penetration test or structured self-review (OWASP checklist walk-through) gates go-live.
tasks.notes: Depends on SystemDefinition5.txt §12 answer (formal pen-test required or not, budget).
